title: BBL Casting - Multiblocks
description: An addon to BBL Casting which adds the multiblock controller to process loads of materials !
body:
# __**Casting Multiblocks**__

## __**Overview**__

BBL Casting Multiblocks re adds the multiblock controller to casting. This version is a lot better than the original version in Casting 1.21.1. Requires BBL Casting !

## __**Multiblock Controller**__

The Multiblock Controller is a customizable multiblock that is the heart of your resource processing. Using the controller you can melt items into molten resources. These resource can processed into resources using Solidifiers


## __**Support**__

Join the BBL [Discord](https://discord.gg/benbenlaw) for support, report bugs and suggest features or additions. You can also support me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/benbenlaw) to gain Alpha access to Modpacks and Mods in dev
